depression.description: I'm constantly worried about my finances since the divorce. I feel like I'm on the brink of losing everything, and it's really hard to focus on anything else.
I can't shake the feeling that I'm unlovable and that everyone will eventually abandon me. It's like I'm destined to be alone.
After the divorce, I've lost so many friends. I feel like nobody wants to be around me anymore, and it just makes me feel more alone.
I'm terrified that if people knew the real me and what I've been through, they would judge me harshly. I feel like I have to put on a good image to be accepted.
Every time I think about visiting my parents, I feel anxious. They don't understand what I'm going through, and I dread the criticism I might face.

Delusion.topic: Belief in needing to be self-reliant
Delusion.description: I feel like I have to handle everything on my own, and asking for help feels like a weakness. It's exhausting trying to be independent all the time.
I often think that if I share my struggles with my friends, they'll see me as a burden and won't want to support me anymore.
